name: Fortified perimeter (curtain) wall
description: Defensive curtain wall around an AABB perimeter. A 2-block-thick double shell of @primary forms the wall; a 1-block-wide allure (walkway) of @floor sits along the inner top edge; alternating merlons and crenels form the battlements along the outer top ring; a stepped foundation of @secondary rises 1 block taller than the y0 wall course; arrow slits (2-tall) are cut every 5 blocks along each face. Evokes medieval castle fortifications.

required_furniture.rule: Two-block-thick curtain wall via two concentric FillHollow shells of @primary.
Allure of @floor blocks 1-2 blocks wide along the top inner edge, just below the merlons.
Alternating merlons (@primary, every other position around the outer top ring) and crenels (gaps).
1-block-tall @primary blocks placed every other position around the outer top perimeter.
Gaps (air) between merlons; archers shoot through these.
Stepped @secondary base; the foundation course rises 1 block taller than the y0 wall course.
Vertical 2-tall slit of cave_air every 5 blocks along each wall, above the stepped foundation and below the merlons.

placement_rules: Wall is 2 blocks thick (two concentric hollow shells)
Walkway sits 1 block in from the outer wall (1-2 blocks wide)
Battlements alternate merlons and crenels around the outer top ring
Foundation 1 block taller than y0 wall
Arrow slits every 5 blocks along the wall, 2 blocks tall
Arrow slits clear of corners (no slit within 3 blocks of a corner)
lighting_ventilation: Arrow slits along all four faces provide minimal but functional ventilation and sight lines; defensive priority over interior light. No glazed openings.

medieval.notes: Classic stone-brick curtain wall with cobblestone footing; mossy stone accents for age.

fantasy.notes: Dark blackstone fortress with mossy footing and dark-oak allure planks.

viking.notes: Rough cobblestone palisade with timber allure floor and log accents.

gothic.notes: Forbidding blackstone curtain with gilded accents along the merlons.

modern.notes: Brutalist re-reading: smooth-stone curtain with andesite footing.

python_skill_signature: build(aabb: AABB, materials: Materials, style: str, **kwargs) -> list[Op]
style_affinity: Medieval / fortified-military motif. Coherent in medieval/castle/rustic/fantasy/gothic. Out of place in Modern, Minimalist, East-Asian, Classical/Renaissance buildings.
